name: sanka
description: Sanka plugin that connects local AI clients to hosted Sanka MCP through a packaged proxy for live CRM, billing, private inbox, expenses, and workflow intents.

interface.shortDescription: Work with live Sanka data and private inbox via native OAuth
interface.longDescription: Use Sanka's packaged local MCP proxy for live Sanka workflows from Codex through native OAuth. The proxy connects to hosted Sanka MCP and can upload exact user-provided local receipt paths as original expense attachment bytes. Start from the installed Sanka chip, the $sanka:sanka router, or a specific $sanka:... skill so Sanka owns CRM, estimates, approvals, quote readiness, billing, private inbox, expenses, and workflow intents such as deal-to-estimate and Salesforce Opportunity quote readiness. If a Sanka MCP response says the plugin is outdated, ask whether to refresh it; when the user says yes, refresh the local sanka-plugin repo, reload or reinstall Sanka, and start a fresh thread. Live Sanka operations must come from attached Sanka MCP tools, not local repo files, Django shell, Postgres, Salesforce MCP, or HubSpot MCP fallbacks.
defaultPrompt: Use $sanka:sanka to route a natural-language Sanka request
Use $sanka:deal-to-estimate to preview an estimate from a HubSpot deal URL
Use $sanka:quote-readiness to check whether a Salesforce Opportunity can be quoted
Use $sanka:list-deals to list recent deals in Sanka
Use $sanka:create-expense to create an expense from a receipt
